title: Sqlitelogictest division by zero on COALESCE call
poc: SELECT COALESCE ( + 55, + 71 * - 23 + 20 + 74 / - COUNT ( ALL - 0 ) / + 75, - 85 / - 71 ) - + - 62 + - - CAST ( + 88 AS INTEGER ) * + + 83 AS col0;
key_bug_features: Division by zero in COALESCE function
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_division (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value1 INTEGER, value2 INTEGER, value3 INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_division (id, value1, value2, value3) VALUES (1, 10, 0, 5);
INSERT INTO test_division (id, value1, value2, value3) VALUES (2, 20, 1, NULL);
SELECT COALESCE(value1 / value2, value3) FROM test_division WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COALESCE(value1 / NULLIF(value2, 0), value3) FROM test_division WHERE id = 2;
